hero.title: Explore Hangzhou Handicrafts from Anywhere
hero.description:
Hangyi Cloud Expo is an online exhibition platform dedicated to handicrafts from Hangzhou.
Discover, appreciate, and collect original works from local artisans.
hero.tip: 🎁 Free online visit for a limited time in 2025

branding.title: Hangyi Cloud Expo brings Hangzhou craftsmanship to the world

introduce.name: introduce
introduce.title: What is Hangyi Cloud Expo
introduce.label: Introduce
introduce.description: Hangyi Cloud Expo is an online platform focused on showcasing handicrafts from Hangzhou, connecting artisans, collectors, and visitors.

items.title: Diverse Hangzhou Crafts
items.description: From silk and tea ware to woodwork and lacquer, discover a wide range of original works created by local artisans.

items.title: Immersive Online Exhibitions
items.description: Enjoy curated galleries and close-up details that make you feel like walking inside a physical exhibition hall.

items.title: Easy Collection & Enquiry
items.description: Save your favorite pieces and easily get in touch with artisans for customization, purchase, or offline visits.

benefit.name: benefit
benefit.title: Why Choose Hangyi Cloud Expo
benefit.label: Benefits
benefit.description: A one-stop way to understand Hangzhou handicrafts, from artworks to artisan stories, and feel the culture of the city.

items.title: Hub for Local Artisans
items.description: Gather outstanding artisans from Hangzhou and present their works in one place, making it easy to discover and compare.

items.title: High-quality Presentation
items.description: Carefully curated contents and photos ensure every piece is presented beautifully and professionally.

items.title: Stories Behind Crafts
items.description: Not only showing the works, but also telling the heritage, inspiration, and everyday life behind each piece and artisan.

usage.name: usage
usage.title: How to Explore Hangzhou Crafts with Hangyi Cloud Expo
usage.description: Follow three simple steps to walk into the world of Hangzhou handicrafts:

items.title: Browse Themed Exhibitions
items.description: Visit the homepage and browse curated sections by theme, material, or craft type.

items.title: Save Your Favorites
items.description: Add the pieces you love to your favorites list to review and compare later.

items.title: Contact Artisans
items.description: Use the contact information provided to talk with artisans for customization, purchase, or offline visits.

items.title: Step into Hangzhou
items.description: Follow recommended routes and maps to visit studios and shops in Hangzhou’s streets and alleys.

feature.name: feature
feature.title: Key Features of Hangyi Cloud Expo
feature.description: Core capabilities to help you better discover, understand, and collect Hangzhou handicrafts.

items.title: Multi-dimensional Categories
items.description: Browse works by craft, material, theme, and price to quickly find what you like.

items.title: Artisan Profiles & Stories
items.description: Each artisan has a dedicated profile with their story, creations, and studio information.

items.title: HD Galleries & Close-ups
items.description: Multiple HD photos reveal textures, details, and craftsmanship traces.

items.title: Curated Themed Exhibitions
items.description: Online exhibitions curated around festivals, city memories, and intangible heritage crafts.

items.title: Recommendation & Favorites
items.description: Smart recommendations based on your preferences and simple management of your favorite pieces.

items.title: Multi-language Friendly
items.description: Supports both Chinese and English to help visitors from all over the world understand Hangzhou crafts.

showcase.name: showcase
showcase.title: Selected Hangzhou Handicraft Pieces
showcase.description: Craft stories from the West Lake, the Grand Canal, and old streets.

items.title: West Lake Silk Hand Fan
items.description: Hand-painted silk folding fan themed around the four seasons of West Lake.

items.title: Longjing Tea Gift Set
items.description: A handcrafted bamboo woven gift set inspired by Longjing tea culture.

items.title: Jiangnan Wood Carving
items.description: Wooden ornaments inspired by Jiangnan roofs and window frames.

items.title: Song-style Celadon Tea Set
items.description: A tea set inheriting the glaze and forms of Southern Song official kilns.

items.title: Hangzhou Textile & Embroidery Bag
items.description: Handmade bags embroidered with elements of West Lake and the canal.

items.title: Handmade Sachets & Incense
items.description: Traditional fragrance recipes in modern sachet and incense designs.

items.title: Woodblock Print of Gongchen Bridge
items.description: Woodblock prints themed around Gongchen Bridge and the Grand Canal.

items.title: Handcrafted Silver Jewelry
items.description: Silver pieces that blend Jiangnan floral and bird motifs.

items.title: Hangzhou Memory Notebook
items.description: Hand-bound notebooks themed around old streets, bridges, and daily scenes.

stats.label: Stats
stats.title: People Love Hangyi Cloud Expo
stats.description: for its warmth, craftsmanship, and stories of Hangzhou.

pricing.name: pricing
pricing.label: Services
pricing.title: Services & Partnership
pricing.description: Service plans for artisans, studios, and institutions to run online exhibitions and promotion.

items.title: Individual Artisan
items.description: Best for independent artisans to start online showcasing.
features: Basic photo and text introduction for works
Basic support for search and categorization
Priority entry to festival & themed exhibitions

items.title: Studios & Boutiques
items.description: For studios and small brands with physical spaces.
items.label: Popular
features: Display of offline shop or studio information
Homepage features and curated exhibition spots
Joint promotion for events and markets
items.tip: Boost brand exposure and connection with the city.

items.title: Institutions & City Partners
items.description: For cultural & tourism institutions, parks, and city branding projects.
features: Custom themed online exhibitions and curation
Multi-city or multi-park joint exhibition areas
items.tip: Co-create the city image of Hangzhou handicrafts.
items.product_name: Hangyi Cloud Expo Institutions & City Partners

testimonial.name: testimonial
testimonial.label: Testimonial
testimonial.title: What People Say About Hangyi Cloud Expo
testimonial.description: Voices from artisans, studios, and visitors.

items.title: David Chen
items.label: Founder of AIWallpaper.shop
items.description: My works used to be only in a small shop. With Hangyi Cloud Expo, visitors from other cities can now find me online and reach out, and my works are seen by many more people.

items.title: Rachel Kim
items.label: CTO at HeyBeauty.ai
items.description: The platform presents our sachets and incense with great details. Many visitors first learn about our craft online and then come to the studio, which converts very well.

items.title: Marcus Thompson
items.label: Solo Developer
items.description: Before my trip, I planned by browsing Hangyi Cloud Expo and saving favorite works. When I arrived, I simply followed the suggested routes to visit studios — super convenient.

items.title: Sofia Garcia
items.label: CEO of Melodisco
items.description: We built collaborations with several Hangzhou artisans through Hangyi Cloud Expo and brought their works to overseas markets. The bilingual support helps us a lot.

items.title: James Wilson
items.label: Tech Lead at GPTs.works
items.description: Hangyi Cloud Expo helps us systematically present the brands and makers in our space and brings us more online bookings and inquiries.

items.title: Anna Zhang
items.label: Startup Founder
items.description: I’m usually busy at work, and it’s hard to search for all the interesting craft shops one by one. Now I can slowly browse on my phone and visit a few studios on weekends — it adds so much ritual to life.

faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About ShipAny
faq.description: Have another question? Contact us on Discord or by email.

items.title: What exactly is ShipAny and how does it work?
items.description: ShipAny is a comprehensive NextJS boilerplate designed specifically for building AI SaaS startups. It provides ready-to-use templates, infrastructure setup, and deployment tools that help you launch your AI business in hours instead of days.

items.title: Do I need advanced technical skills to use ShipAny?
items.description: While basic programming knowledge is helpful, ShipAny is designed to be developer-friendly. Our templates and documentation make it easy to get started, even if you're not an expert in AI or cloud infrastructure.

items.title: What types of AI SaaS can I build with ShipAny?
items.description: ShipAny supports a wide range of AI applications, from content generation to data analysis tools. Our templates cover popular use cases like AI chatbots, content generators, image processing apps, and more.

items.title: How long does it typically take to launch with ShipAny?
items.description: With ShipAny, you can have a working prototype in hours and a production-ready application in hours. Our one-click deployment and pre-configured infrastructure significantly reduce the traditional months-long development cycle.

items.title: What's included in the ShipAny infrastructure?
items.description: ShipAny provides a complete infrastructure stack including authentication, database setup, API integration, payment processing, and scalable cloud deployment. Everything is pre-configured following industry best practices.

items.title: Can I customize the templates to match my brand?
items.description: Absolutely! All ShipAny templates are fully customizable. You can modify the design, features, and functionality to match your brand identity and specific business requirements while maintaining the robust underlying infrastructure.
